title: KandyToys 52 Piece Magnetic Numbers & Letters - Educational Toys Fridge Magnets Spelling and Maths
features: The Perfect Set - This Magnetic letters and numbers set is a great learning resource for youngsters an will help them develop early letter and number recognition.
Educational Tool - Help little ones learn the alphabet, basic spelling and to count numbers.
Easy To Handle - Each letter and number measures approximately 4cm high.
Fun bright colours - The letters and symbols come in a mix of fun bright colours to keep youngsters engaged with their letters.
Go Wild - Stick them to metal surfaces like fridges and freezers, the classic fridge magnet, Ages 3+.
